content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1/5.6.3 WARN — RatingGateView.swift filters users by pre-rating (routes <4 stars to feedback form, ≥4 stars to App Store write-review link via `itms-apps://...action=write-review`), bypassing `SKStoreReviewController`/`requestReview`, and description.txt explicitly asks users to "rate us 5 stars".

Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits gating or filtering which users are directed to write a review based on their sentiment/star selection, and requires use of the system `requestReview` API rather than direct App Store write-review links — this is a textbook 5.6.3 dark pattern. Also asking for "5 stars" in marketing copy is a 5.6.1 violation. Fix: replace this custom gate with `SKStoreReviewController.requestReview(in:)` (or `RequestReviewAction` in SwiftUI) shown to all users equally, remove the sentiment branching and the direct `itms-apps://write-review` URL, and drop the "rate us 5 stars" language from the description.
